ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Mar-23-2017 Discharged

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Dec-13-2016 Discharged

Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; & Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-30-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Set for hearing on March 30, 2006, plaintiff's motion to compel responses to post judgment discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 21 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Ntc Of Mo To Compel Ans To Post-Judgt Disco
Off Calendar Feb-07-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion to compel post judgment discovery is ordered off calendar as it was not timely served. CCP Section 1005 requires that motions be served and filed 16 court days prior to the hearing, with five calendar days added if the motion was served by mail. The motion was filed on January 12, 2006 and served by mail. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2005 Off Calendar
